description: Machine-readable normalization rules registry for LENS NextGen cognitive normalization integration. Defines ALI-01..07 integration rules, qualifier rendering rules, narrative rules, propagation rules, and governance enforcement rules.

normalization_rules.name: Cluster Pressure Index signal label normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: If source CPI key detected in any executive-visible field: NORM-DIAG-01 triggered

normalization_rules.name: Cluster Fan Asymmetry signal label normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: If source CFA key detected in any executive-visible field: NORM-DIAG-01 triggered

normalization_rules.name: Executive readiness state label normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: Raw readiness_state enum values must never appear in any executive-visible field

normalization_rules.name: Domain name alias normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: All domain references in executive surface must use configured alias. Raw IDs trigger NORM-DIAG-01.

normalization_rules.name: Cluster name alias normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: All cluster references in executive surface use configured alias.

normalization_rules.name: Diagnostic state body-text normalization
normalization_rules.source_field: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY occurrences in body text (outside readiness badge)
normalization_rules.target_field: Any body text reference to diagnostic state
normalization_rules.enforcement: Wherever DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY state is referenced in narrative text, ALI-06 substitutes the executive label.

normalization_rules.name: Suppressed signal absence notice
normalization_rules.absence_notice_text: Signal intelligence withheld from this view
normalization_rules.enforcement: Q-04 signals are never rendered. Their absence is always made explicit via absence notice. Silent suppression triggers governance violation.

normalization_rules.name: Q-01 Partial Grounding qualifier chip rendering
normalization_rules.tooltip_template: Analysis based on {grounded_domain_count} of {domain_count} grounded domains. Findings reflect confirmed structural topology within the analyzed scope.
normalization_rules.enforcement: Q-01 chip must appear on readiness badge and any signal cards with Q-01 grounding_status. Tooltip must render. Scope note injected.

normalization_rules.name: Q-02 Structural View qualifier chip rendering
normalization_rules.tooltip_template: Structural topology confirmed. Semantic depth reflects available domain grounding.
normalization_rules.enforcement: Q-02 chip on readiness badge. Tooltip renders. Scope note in CONFIDENCE panel.

normalization_rules.name: Q-03 Under Review qualifier indicator rendering
normalization_rules.tooltip_template: This analysis is under structural review. Advisory confirmation recommended before executive action.
normalization_rules.enforcement: Q-03 indicator on readiness badge. Narrative framed as diagnostic. Advisory confirmation note in CONFIDENCE panel.

normalization_rules.name: Q-04 Suppressed signal absence handling
normalization_rules.absence_notice_text: Signal intelligence withheld from this view
normalization_rules.enforcement: No signal content rendered for Q-04 signals. Explicit absence notice mandatory. Blank section is a governance violation.

normalization_rules.name: Propagation direction language normalization
normalization_rules.enforcement: Propagation descriptions use only approved directional vocabulary. No spatial metaphors that imply velocity, time, or intent.

normalization_rules.name: Propagation numerical value prohibition
normalization_rules.prohibition: No numerical values in propagation descriptions
normalization_rules.replacement_rule: Replace numerical references with PressureTier labels (HIGH/ELEVATED/MODERATE/LOW)
normalization_rules.enforcement: Propagation text must never contain numerical derivation values. Pressure tier labels are the only quantitative language permitted.

normalization_rules.name: Propagation scope qualification for partial evidence
normalization_rules.obligation: Propagation description must include scope qualifier
normalization_rules.scope_template: Propagation analysis covers confirmed topology within {grounded_domain_count} of {domain_count} domains.
normalization_rules.enforcement: When qualifier is Q-01/Q-02, propagation claims are bounded. The normalization layer injects scope qualification.

normalization_rules.name: Inverted pyramid narrative structure
normalization_rules.layer_4: Qualifier scope if Q-01/Q-02 (1 sentence; end of summary)
normalization_rules.enforcement: executive_summary must lead with conclusion. Evidence follows finding. Qualifier scope note is last, not first.

normalization_rules.name: Executive-first phrasing transformation
normalization_rules.principle: Findings stated in executive significance terms, not technical mechanism terms

examples.technical: L2 contribution from cluster key abc123

normalization_rules.enforcement: Technical language triggers NORM-DIAG-01 if found in executive-visible narrative fields.

normalization_rules.name: Structural-first explanation order
normalization_rules.principle: Describe what topology shows before interpreting what it means

example.observation: [Domain alias] shows concentrated pressure in [cluster alias].
example.interpretation: This pattern indicates structural bottleneck rather than capacity issue.

normalization_rules.enforcement: Interpretation sentences must follow observation sentences, not precede them.

normalization_rules.name: Sentence length and readability constraint
forbidden_patterns: nested dependent clauses in primary finding sentences
normalization_rules.enforcement: Narrative sentences exceeding 25 words trigger NORM-DIAG-01. Incomplete sentences trigger NORM-DIAG-01.

normalization_rules.name: Executive summary finding density constraint
normalization_rules.principle: Density is managed through hierarchy, not through information removal
normalization_rules.enforcement: executive_summary contains maximum 3 primary findings. Additional findings in structural_summary. No evidence is discarded — only display priority is managed.

normalization_rules.name: Signal card default visibility constraint
normalization_rules.enforcement: Maximum 5 signal cards visible by default per domain. Additional cards accessible via evidence drawer expansion. No signal card is discarded.

normalization_rules.name: Trace reference label rendering
normalization_rules.principle: Trace identifiers are rendered as reference labels, not decoded values
normalization_rules.enforcement: Trace identifiers appear as opaque reference labels in the TRACE panel. No decoding or interpretation of the identifier value.

normalization_rules.name: derivation_hash executive surface prohibition
normalization_rules.enforcement: derivation_hash never appears in executive or advisory surface. Available as reference ID in LINEAGE panel for AUDIT tier only.

normalization_rules.name: Predictive language prohibition
normalization_rules.fail_message: Predictive language detected in normalized narrative — governance violation — no predictive authority in governed structural derivation
normalization_rules.enforcement: Any predictive pattern in normalized narrative output triggers BLOCKED state.

normalization_rules.name: Recommendation language prohibition
normalization_rules.fail_message: Recommendation language detected — governance violation — reports provide intelligence not prescriptions
normalization_rules.enforcement: Recommendation patterns trigger BLOCKED state. Advisory determines remediation; the report does not.

normalization_rules.name: Speculative and probabilistic language prohibition
normalization_rules.fail_message: Speculative language detected — replace with evidence-bounded statement or qualifier scope note
normalization_rules.enforcement: Speculative patterns trigger DIAGNOSTIC treatment. Uncertainty must be expressed through Q-taxonomy qualifiers, not speculative prose.

normalization_rules.name: Consumer AI and chatbot phrasing prohibition
normalization_rules.fail_message: Consumer AI phrasing detected — governance violation — LENS is not a chatbot product
normalization_rules.enforcement: AI/chatbot phrasing triggers BLOCKED state. These patterns indicate a fundamental normalization failure.

normalization_rules.name: ALI rule determinism guarantee
normalization_rules.guarantee: Same ALI rule + same source value produces same executive label on every invocation
normalization_rules.state_requirement: ALI mapping is stateless — no session context, client history, or time affects output
normalization_rules.version_requirement: normalization_version recorded in rendering_metadata; same version always produces same output
normalization_rules.enforcement: Non-deterministic normalization output (same input → different output) is a governance violation. LENS rendering of committed normalized content is deterministic by construction.

normalization_rules.name: Stateless normalization guarantee
normalization_rules.guarantee: Normalization pipeline has no session state — prior reports, prior interactions, user identity do not influence normalization output
normalization_rules.allowed_state: client_topology_config (fixed at analysis time); normalization_version (fixed at generation time)
normalization_rules.forbidden_state: session history, user preferences, prior report content, interaction context
normalization_rules.enforcement: Normalization must produce identical output for identical GEIOS artifacts regardless of execution context.

normalization_rules.name: ALI rule miss diagnostic trigger
normalization_rules.trigger: Source value has no ALI mapping in active normalization_version
normalization_rules.behavior: Technical label suppressed (blank, not raw label). DIAGNOSTIC notice on affected field.
normalization_rules.fail_message: Normalization miss: source field has no ALI mapping — technical label suppressed; advisory review required
normalization_rules.prohibited_behavior: Do not display raw technical label when ALI rule miss occurs
normalization_rules.enforcement: ALI miss = blank label + DIAGNOSTIC notice. Never show raw GEIOS field name to executive.

normalization_rules.name: Normalization version mismatch diagnostic
normalization_rules.trigger: rendering_metadata.normalization_version does not match active normalization dictionary version
normalization_rules.behavior: DIAGNOSTIC notice on narrative block. Report continues to render from committed normalized content (do not re-normalize).
normalization_rules.fail_message: Normalization version mismatch — report was generated with an earlier normalization dictionary — advisory review recommended
normalization_rules.enforcement: Version mismatch does not trigger BLOCKED; it triggers DIAGNOSTIC. Committed report_object content is still valid.
